top_signals.title: Former De Beers CEO Penny Is Said to Lead Race for Diamond Giant
top_signals.summary: A consortium led by De Beers’s former boss Gareth Penny is leading the race to buy the world’s biggest diamond miner after the Iran war hampered other bidders, according to people familiar with the matter.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Christine Lagarde: Money in transition
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: FTC warns of record $3.5 billion losses to imposter scams in 2025
top_signals.summary: The U.S. Federal Trade Commission (FTC) warned that Americans lost $3.5 billion to imposter scams in 2025, with reported losses nearly tripling since 2020. [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: State Street launches GENIUS-compliant money market fund for stablecoin issuers
top_signals.summary: SSCXX is a Rule 2a-7 government money market fund, a conservative type of fund that invests only in cash and yield-bearing cash equivalents.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.
